_comment: Seed data for the rbac-config DynamoDB table.
_comment2: Replace Telegram user IDs below with real IDs. You can get a user's ID by messaging @userinfobot on Telegram.
_comment3: Roles: 'viewer' (read-only, no approvals), 'approver' (can approve/reject), 'deployer' (can approve, reject, and trigger /deploy)
_comment4: Run: python scripts/rbac_sync.py  to write these entries to DynamoDB
